results.question: what is tag 22
results.description: Returns tag 22 name + description, NOT a flood of enum values
results.answer_preview: Tag 22 is SecurityIDSource.  Description: Identifies class of alternative SecurityID

results.question: what values can tag 22 have
results.description: Returns enum values for tag 22 including ISIN
results.answer_preview: Tag 22 is SecurityIDSource.  Description: Identifies class of alternative SecurityID  Allowed values:  - 1: CUSIP — CUSIP  - 2: SEDOL — SEDOL  - 3: QUIK — QUIK  - 4: ISINNumber — ISIN number  - 5: RICCode — RIC code  - 6: ISOCurrencyCode — ISO Currency Code  - 7: ISOCountryCode — ISO Country Code  -

results.question: what tag is exec broker
results.description: Returns tag 76 ExecBroker — both tag number AND name must appear
results.answer_preview: Best structured matches: - ExecBroker — Identifies executing / give-up broker. Standard NASD market-maker mnemonic is preferred. (Tag: 76) - OrderPercent — For CIV specifies the approximate order quantity desired. For a CIV Sale it specifies percentage of investor’s total holding to be sold. For a C

results.question: what tag can have a value ISIN
results.description: Reverse enum lookup — returns tag 22 SecurityIDSource
results.answer_preview: Tag 373 (SessionRejectReason) allows value 5: ValueIsIncorrect — Value is incorrect (out of range) for this tag. Tag 22 (SecurityIDSource) allows value 4: ISINNumber — ISIN number.

results.question: what tags contain security
results.description: Discovery — returns list of tags with security in name/desc
results.answer_preview: Structured records: - SecuritySettlAgentAcctName — Name of SettlInstSource's account at local agent bank if SettlLocation is not a depository (Tag: 179) - SecurityStatus — MsgType = f (lowercase) (ComponentID: 39) - DerivativeSecurityList — MsgType = AA (2 A's) (ComponentID: 60) - LiquidityNumSecuri
